description_long: This is an electric guitar with a solid, contoured body finished in a glossy deep red color, complemented by a white pickguard. The body features two visible pickups, a control knob layout, and a metallic bridge. The neck is a lighter wood with inlaid fret markers and leads to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged in a single row. The hardware, including the bridge and tuning pegs, appears metallic, while the strings run the length of the neck. The overall design is reminiscent of classic rock guitars, suitable for both performance and display in urban environments.
description: A glossy red electric guitar with a white pickguard, metallic hardware, and a single-row headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red body, white pickguard, pickups, control knobs, and full neck with fret markers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile, the thickness of the body, and the length of the neck.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the body shape, pickguard, pickup layout, and the alignment of the neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back contour of the body, neck, and the arrangement of the tuning pegs.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a rounded contour.
